description_long: This object features a medium-sized bonsai tree with reddish-brown leaves, planted in a rectangular wooden container that sits atop a patch of earth. The bonsai's trunk is thick and gnarled, with visible roots extending over the edge of the container and into the surrounding soil. The branches are moderately dense, spreading outward and upward, with a natural, informal arrangement. Fallen leaves are scattered around the base, adding to the sense of age and realism. The container is reinforced with dark metal bands and has a weathered, rustic appearance. The entire composition is set on a square section of ground, suggesting it is meant for outdoor display.
description: A mature bonsai tree with reddish foliage in a weathered wooden container, set on a patch of earth with exposed roots and scattered leaves.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen from the front, highlighting the thick trunk, exposed roots, and the spread of branches and leaves over the container.
description_view_1: A side view showing the depth of the container and the vertical rise of the trunk, with the tree's silhouette prominent against the background.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the container, the continuation of the roots, and the arching branches extending outward.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the roots spreading into the soil and the vertical structure of the trunk, with the foliage forming a canopy above.
attribute_pot_type: Rectangular wooden container with dark metal bands, rustic and weathered, no visible decorative patterns.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is thick and gnarled, with a natural, informal upright style featuring gentle bends and visible movement.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are moderately dense and spread outward and upward in an informal, natural pattern, with some layering and irregular spacing.
attribute_leaf_density: Moderate to dense, with foliage concentrated at the branch tips and some open areas, giving a balanced but not overly lush appearance.
